title: 2. VAT Reduction – Medical Supplies
text:
5% VAT Reduction
On Selected
Medical Supplies
Effective Sep 1st
Selected medical
supplies will be
reduced from 10%
to 5%.
For more details:
www.inlandrevenue.finance.gov.bs
Ref: Value Added Tax (Amendment)(No.2) Act, 2025

5% VAT Reduced
